metadata_fields_intro: Beyond the analytical metrics above, AĒR tracks 22 Tier-B / Tier-C metadata fields per article and attempts to extract every one from the publisher's structured metadata (JSON-LD, OpenGraph, microdata, HTML meta).
metadata_fields_why_empty: Most fields are empty not because AĒR lacks an extractor, but because the publisher does not declare them — structural absence, a publisher choice (WP-003 §3.2). A few are present but constant across the whole corpus, so they carry no signal. The figures below are measured live across every observed source.
metadata_fields_error: Metadata-field coverage is unavailable right now.
metadata_tier_b_blurb: Common publisher metadata — most news sites declare these in structured form, so AĒR harvests them directly.
metadata_tier_c_blurb: Specialised or rarely-declared fields. Many would need a custom heuristic extractor beyond generic structured-metadata harvesting, so they stay empty for most sources today.
metadata_field_meta_unobserved: Not observed in any source yet.
metadata_field_meta_constant: Constant = {value} across {sources} source(s) — present but no signal.
metadata_field_desc_published_date: When the article was first published, as declared by the publisher.
metadata_field_desc_modified_date: When the article was last edited, as declared by the publisher.
metadata_field_desc_description: The publisher's own summary or teaser of the article.
metadata_field_desc_categories: Editorial categories the publisher assigns to the article.
metadata_field_desc_tags: Free-form keyword tags attached by the publisher.
metadata_field_desc_section: The newspaper section the article belongs to (e.g. Politics, Sport).
metadata_field_desc_article_type: The schema.org content type (e.g. NewsArticle, LiveBlogPosting).
metadata_field_desc_word_count: Number of words in the article body.
metadata_field_desc_comment_count: Number of reader comments, where the publisher exposes it.
metadata_field_desc_comment_url: Link to the article's comment thread.
metadata_field_desc_editor: The editor credited on the article, distinct from the author.
metadata_field_desc_reading_time_minutes: Estimated reading time the publisher prints.
metadata_field_desc_dateline_location: The place-of-reporting dateline at the head of the article.
metadata_field_desc_paywall_status: Whether the article sits behind a paywall.
metadata_field_desc_correction_notice: A published correction or update note on the article.
metadata_field_desc_editorial_labels: Editorial labels such as Opinion, Analysis, or Sponsored.
metadata_field_desc_external_citations: Outbound links the article cites as sources.
metadata_field_desc_images: All structured images declared for the article, not just the lead.
metadata_field_desc_revision_date: A distinct revision timestamp where the publisher versions the article.
